title: Simple, beautiful
description: This resource pack adds a beautiful background to the main menu. And that's all, I always use it.
body:
## Simple, beautiful


The resource pack adds a beautiful background to the main menu that you might like, usually I always use it.

---
**Enjoy the game**
---
